objective: Add local MATLAB command-line adapter, table parser, plot-export script helper, and tool schemas.
execution_method: Implement check config, check code, evaluate code, run file, run test file, detect toolboxes, table parsing, plot-export script generation, and script creation helpers with dry-run support.
quality_gate: Schemas are bounded; direct-call choices are validated; dry-run returns deterministic commands; no MATLAB install required for tests.

objective: Register MATLAB adapter and all MATLAB tools in discovery and capability catalog.
execution_method: Import adapter during discovery and add internal capability metadata for MATLAB execution and post-processing helpers.
quality_gate: Server initializes with all matlab tools and no duplicate names.

objective: Add focused MATLAB adapter tests and schema coverage.
execution_method: Add pytest coverage for config, dry-run command construction, file creation, table parsing, plot-export script generation, registration, and schema compatibility.
quality_gate: Focused MATLAB tests and registry schema tests pass without MATLAB installed.

objective: Document MATLAB support, local post-processing helpers, and upstream provenance.
execution_method: Update tool map, configuration examples, limitations, catalog metadata, tracking files, and run log.
quality_gate: Docs mention MATLAB command-line adapter, table parser, plot-export script helper, dry-run boundary, and official MathWorks MCP reference.

execution_method: Run ruff and focused pytest checks.
quality_gate: Checks pass or blockers are documented.
